title: SendArgs
description:
Args for `com.nexus.notifications::send` (handler id `1`).

Lifted to a file-scope public type so the schema generator can
emit a JSON Schema + TypeScript binding for the IPC contract.
Matches the `nexus-linkpreview::FetchArgs` pattern.

channel.description: Target channel — one of [`Channel`]'s snake_case variants.

message.description: Notification body. UTF-8, no length cap at the IPC layer.

title.description:
Optional title. When omitted, transports that need a header
fall back to `"Nexus"`.

Channel.description:
Supported notification channels for v1. Add variants in append-
only order; the wire form (`serde rename_all = "snake_case"`)
pins the JSON tag.

oneOf.description:
Desktop OS notification, bridged through the shell via a bus
event ([`NOTIFICATION_DELIVERED_TOPIC`]).
Discord webhook — HTTP POST to a configured URL.
